form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (26.27) over 460m at Geelong. Has the inside draw but will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.59) at this track in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win, finishing third and beaten 3 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (22.67) at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need the right run to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Rank Limit - Grade 6 on April 11 over 390m at Ballarat behind Glimmer Of Hope beaten 4.5 lengths (22.65). Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.
